title: matelea woytkowskii
intro: Matelea woytkowskii, also known as the Woytkowski matelea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its alkaloids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The Woytkowski matelea has been used to treat fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. Herbal preparations of Matelea woytkowskii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically used in folk medicine in its native regions.
